query: LIV Golf 2026 schedule New York Bedminster event August 6-9 2026 confirmed or cancelled, LIV Golf financial situation 2026
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings:

**Bedminster Event (Aug 6–9, 2026): CONFIRMED, still scheduled**
- The LIV Golf New York event at Trump National Bedminster was announced January 26, 2026 (tickets on sale Jan 27) and **remains live on LIV's official schedule with tickets on sale** as of July 12, 2026. It has NOT been cancelled or postponed.
- It's viewed as the **most secure** of LIV's four remaining events, partly due to Trump–Saudi connections.
- **Caveat:** CEO Scott O'Neil has explicitly refused to guarantee any of the final four events will be played.

**Financial Situation: Acute crisis**
- Saudi PIF provided only **~$200M of ~$600M committed** for 2026 (~1/3), per the Financial Times.
- PIF is **withdrawing funding after the 2026 season**; it operates on monthly injections that insiders fear could dry up before the season ends.
- The **New Orleans event was already postponed** (April 2026).
- LIV filed a **WARN Act notice** in July 2026 signaling likely layoffs; it's seeking up to ~$350M in new outside capital for 2027+.
- The Michigan Team Championship (Aug 27–30) is considered most at risk; Bedminster and the UK event are considered safest.

Note: I hit rate/credit limits on the AskNews tools, but cross-validated all key facts across LIV's official site, ESPN, CBS Sports, Front Office Sports, Golf Magic, CNN, and Sportico.

sources.title: LIV Golf New York
sources.snippet: August 6-9, 2026 Trump National Golf Club Bedminster. LIV Golf is officially back in the New York region for the 2026 season, returning to Trump National.

sources.title: LIV Golf announces return to New York market for 2026 season
sources.snippet: LIV Golf New York to be hosted at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster Aug. 6-9, 2026. Tickets go on sale Jan. 27.

sources.title: LIV Golf sets 2026 Bedminster return; tickets go on sale Jan. 27
sources.snippet: LIV Golf announced it will return to the New York market in 2026 with an event at Trump National Golf Club Bedminster, Aug. 6-9, 2026 - its third visit and first since 2023.

sources.title: Report: LIV Golf's remaining events in doubt amid funding shortfall
sources.snippet: PIF provided only ~$200m of ~$600m committed for 2026 ($66m early May, ~$130m June). UK and Bedminster expected to proceed; final two events (Indianapolis, Michigan) in doubt.

sources.title: LIV Golf Saudi funding season report
sources.snippet: Four remaining events: UK (Jul 23-26), New York/Bedminster (Aug 6-9), Indianapolis (Aug 20-23), Michigan Team Championship (Aug 27-30, $40M). 'Every remaining tournament is on the fence.'

sources.title: LIV CEO Won't Guarantee Final 4 Events of 2026 Season Happen
sources.snippet: CEO Scott O'Neil on CNBC would not guarantee the four remaining events: 'What I can guarantee is a heck of a return if you come invest in this business.' PIF spend to surpass $6B; LIV seeking up to $350M new capital.

sources.title: LIV Golf CEO won't guarantee final 4 events of '26 to be played
sources.snippet: LIV Golf CEO Scott O'Neil would not guarantee that the final four events of the 2026 season would be played.

sources.title: LIV Golf restructures as Saudi Arabia ends funding after 2026 season
sources.snippet: PIF informed LIV it is withdrawing funding at the conclusion of the 2026 season; league may be on the verge of insolvency.

sources.title: LIV Golf Signals Looming Layoffs After PIF Funding Cuts
sources.snippet: LIV Golf told US and UK employees it is likely facing layoffs and is filing a WARN Act notice.

sources.title: LIV Golf moves to postpone New Orleans event amid clouded future
sources.snippet: LIV Golf aims to postpone its summer New Orleans event, per Louisiana officials, with a desire to reschedule for later in the year.

sources.title: LIV Golf: Work begins on Indy event
sources.snippet: Build-out (scaffolding) for LIV Indianapolis started around June 29, 2026, '7 weeks away,' though the remaining events are now in doubt.

sources.title: LIV Golf will NOT be funded by Saudi PIF past 2026 season
sources.snippet: Fox News' Bret Baier confirmed PIF will fund LIV through the rest of 2026 but end long-term commitment after the season.

PIF funding provided for 2026 season (of ~$600M committed)
